trigger_queries.query: guardrail my workflow so it doesn't finish early
loop until this task is actually verified complete
make sure the subagent doesn't claim done prematurely
add completion detection to this phase
write a simple hello world script

stacked_scenario.query: Plan and execute a multi-subagent task with completion verification
stacked_scenario.expected_behavior: hm-planning-with-files creates plan, hm-coordinating-loop dispatches subagents, hm-completion-looping verifies outputs before accepting DONE
